summary: This project explores the concept of a self-driving car system using modern deep learning techniques.
learnTitle: Self-Driving Car Using Advanced Deep Learning
learnDesc: This project explores the concept of a self-driving car system using modern deep learning techniques. The main focus is on understanding how artificial intelligence can be applied to help a vehicle perceive its surroundings and make driving-related decisions in a controlled and experimental setting
about: The project studies how data from different sensors such as cameras and simulated inputs can be processed to recognize road elements like lanes, vehicles, pedestrians, and traffic signs.
Based on this understanding, the system is designed to support basic decision-making such as lane following and obstacle awareness.
Rather than building a fully autonomous vehicle for public roads, the project emphasizes learning, simulation, and experimentation.

howItWorks.title: AI Processing
howItWorks.desc: Analyzes real time data from the vehicle's environment

howItWorks.title: Vehicle Control
howItWorks.desc: Makes driving decisions based on the processed data

howItWorks.title: Sensor Integration
howItWorks.desc: Uses data from sensors like cameras, radar, and LIDAR.

features: Safe testing of vehicle before real world use
Focus on safety, reliability, and real-time processing

summary: AI system to organize and summarize meeting content.
learnDesc: The Minute-of-Meeting (MoM) Tracker is an Al-based system designed to assist in automatically organizing and summarizing meeting content. The project focuses on transforming meeting audio or text into structured and easy-to-read meeting minutes.
about: The system works by converting spoken content into text and then analyzing the conversation to identify key discussion points, decisions, and action items.
It aims to reduce the manual effort required to write meeting minutes while improving consistency and clarity.

Instead of replacing human judgment, the project is designed as a support tool that helps users quickly review meeting outcomes. The generated MoM can include summaries of discussions, identified tasks, and important follow-up points, presented in a clean and professional format.

howItWorks.title: Speech-to-Text Conversion
howItWorks.desc: Transforms meeting audio into text format

howItWorks.title: Analysis
howItWorks.desc: Extracts important discussions, decisions, and tasks

howItWorks.title: Report
howItWorks.desc: Generates clean and organized meeting minutes

features: Reduces manual effort in writing meeting minutes

summary: AI system for early wildfire detection.
learnTitle: FireWatch: AI-Powered Wildfire Early Detection System
learnDesc: FireWatch is a concept-based project that explores the use of artificial intelligence for early wildfire detection. The system is designed to analyze visual data to identify potential fire or smoke patterns and notify users through a mobile application.
about: The project focuses on integrating computer vision with a mobile alert system to support faster awareness and response.
When a potential threat is detected, the system is designed to trigger notifications that can be viewed on a mobile device, helping users stay informed in near real time.
FireWatch emphasizes learning and experimentation in Al, mobile development, and system integration.

howItWorks.title: Image Processing
howItWorks.desc: Analyzes visual inputs to detect signs of fire or smoke

howItWorks.title: AI Detection Model
howItWorks.desc: Uses deep learning to recognize wildfire patterns

howItWorks.title: Mobile Alert System
howItWorks.desc: Sends instant notifications to users for quick awareness

features: Integration of AI with cross-platform mobile applications
Supports faster response and situational awareness

learnDesc: This project focuses on developing a digital land registry system designed to improve the management and transparency of land records. The system explores how modern web technologies can be used to organize land information in a structured and accessible way.
about: The platform provides a user-friendly interface where authorized users can view and manage land-related records.
To support data integrity and trust, the project incorporates a permissioned blockchain approach, ensuring that updates to land records are traceable and protected from unauthorized changes

howItWorks.title: Browse Menu
howItWorks.desc: Users view available food items through a clean interface

howItWorks.title: Place Order
howItWorks.desc: Select items and submit orders

howItWorks.title: Order Processing
howItWorks.desc: System handles orders through a server-centric backend

learnTitle: Druk Vies: Digital Movie Streaming Platform
learnDesc: DrukVies is a concept-based digital movie streaming platform designed to explore how online media services can be adapted to a local context. The project focuses on creating a user-friendly platform where users can browse, discover, and stream video content through a clean and structured interface.
about: The system is designed with an emphasis on simplicity, usability, and content organization.
It allows users to view available movies, access basic details, and manage their viewing experience in an intuitive way.
Rather than competing with large commercial platforms, DrukVies serves as an academic project to study the core functionality behind streaming services.

howItWorks.title: Browse Content
howItWorks.desc: Users explore available movies through a structured interface

howItWorks.title: Stream Videos
howItWorks.desc: Watch content directly within the platform

howItWorks.title: Manage Viewing
howItWorks.desc: Access movie details and control viewing experience

features: Basic movie details and streaming functionality
Focus on user experience and simplicity

learnDesc: This project focuses on developing a digital job-matching platform designed to connect employers with job seekers through a structured and easy-to-use system. The platform aims to simplify the hiring process by providing a central space where job opportunities and candidate profiles can be managed efficiently.
about: Job seekers can create profiles, upload their Cvs, and apply for available positions, while employers can post job listings and review applicant information.
The system is designed to support clear communication between both parties and reduce the reliance on informal or manual recruitment mathods

howItWorks.title: Create Profile
howItWorks.desc: Job seekers bulld profiles and upload CVs

howItWorks.title: Post & Apply Jobs
howItWorks.desc: Employers post jobs, and users apply for positions

howItWorks.title: Manage Applications
howItWorks.desc: Both parties review and manage applications

learnDesc: This project focuses on developing a web-based veterinary appointment system designed to improve access to animal healthcare services in Bhutan. The platform aims to connect pet owners, livestock farmers, and licensed veterinarians through a single, organized digital system.
about: Due to Bhutan's challenging geography, scattered settlements, and limited availability of veterinary professionals, many animal owners face difficulties in accessing timely veterinary care.
The existing process is mostly informal, often relying on personal networks, which can lead to delays and inconsistent service delivery.
This project explores how a digital solution can help reduce these challenges by simplifying communication and appointment scheduling.

howItWorks.title: Find Vet
howItWorks.desc: Search veterinarians by location and availability

howItWorks.title: Book Appointment
howItWorks.desc: Schedule visits and manage pet details

howItWorks.title: Manage System
howItWorks.desc: Vets update availability, admins ensure reliability

features: Improved communication between clients and veterinarians

learnDesc: Apu Gutho, also known as Druk Mancala, is a digital version of a traditional Bhutanese board game inspired by the classic Mancala. The project focuses on preserving and presenting Bhutanese culture through a simple and interactive digital game.
about: The game is designed with 7 pits, where 6 pits are paired and placed below one main pit, following a structure similar to Mancala.
Players distribute stones based on adjusted rules that reflect the Bhutanese context rather than copying the original Mancala rules directly.

howItWorks.title: Game Structure
howItWorks.desc: 7 pits layout with 6 paired pits and 1 main pit

howItWorks.title: Stone Distribution
howItWorks.desc: Players move stones based on adapted gameplay rules

howItWorks.title: Gameplay Objective
howItWorks.desc: Strategically collect and manage stones to win

features: Improved communication between clients and veterinarians

learnDesc: Druk Ghi Makhu is a concept-based mobile application designed to simplify fuel refilling for vehicle owners in Bhutan. The idea is to allow users to request fuel delivery remotely, reducing the need to physically visit fuel stations. Through the app. users can place a fuel request from their home, office, or other locations.
about: The systern is intended to manage the request process in a simple and user-friendly way, focusing on convenience and time-saving

The core objective of this project is to explore how digital solutions can improve everyciay services in Shutan, using a mobile platform to address common challenges related to fuel access and waiting time

howItWorks.title: Request Fuel
howItWorks.desc: Users place fuel orders from their current location

howItWorks.title: Delivery Process
howItWorks.desc: System manages and processes fuel delivery requests

howItWorks.title: User Interaction
howItWorks.desc: Simple interface for tracking and managing requests

features: Remote fuel request from any location

learnTitle: G-iteria: Streamlined Cafeteria & Online Ordering System
learnDesc: G-iteria is a web-based cafeteria ordering system designed to simplify the food ordering process through a clean and efficient digital platform. The project focuses on creating a fast and straightforward user experience where customers can view menus and place orders without unnecessary complexity.
about: The system is built with an emphasis on performance and reliability, using a simple frontend and a server-centric backend approach.
Instead of relying on heavy frameworks, the project explores how a lightweight architecture can still support essential features such as order submission and basic administration.

howItWorks.title: Browse Menu
howItWorks.desc: Users view available food items through a clean interface

howItWorks.title: Place Order
howItWorks.desc: Select items and submit orders

howItWorks.title: Order Processing
howItWorks.desc: System handles orders through a server-centric backend
